## Verification

- [ ] `npm run validate:templates`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## Template checklist

- [ ] New public templates include `meta.json` and `code.md`.
- [ ] `category` matches the folder path under `板子/`.
- [ ] Source and license are recorded.
